summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进默认主题、聊天操作区、工作区预览、文档路由和模型流稳定性。
summary.en-US: This release improves the default theme, chat controls, workspace previews, docs routing, and model stream reliability.

body.zh-CN: 默认主题使用更明亮的工作台样式，侧栏、导航、消息气泡和 marketplace 区域更统一。
body.en-US: The default theme now uses a brighter workspace style with more consistent sidebar, navigation, message bubble, and marketplace surfaces.

body.zh-CN: 模型、thinking、上下文窗口和发送操作收在同一排，模型选择控件不再占用过宽空间。
body.en-US: Model selection, thinking, context window, and send actions now sit together with a compact model trigger.

body.zh-CN: 侧边栏支持置顶会话和项目，项目列表可以展开为文件夹行。
body.en-US: The sidebar supports pinned sessions and projects, with expandable project folder rows.

body.zh-CN: 右侧工作区面板可以浏览目录、刷新文件，并在当前会话区域内最大化。
body.en-US: The workspace side panel can browse directories, refresh files, and maximize inside the conversation area.

body.zh-CN: 不完整的 Responses 流会按失败运行处理，瞬时失败会带重试信息和退避策略。
body.en-US: Incomplete Responses streams are treated as failed runs, and transient failures retry with metadata and backoff.

body.zh-CN: 历史图片工具结果不会继续挤占后续模型上下文，高细节图片也会受尺寸和预算控制。
body.en-US: Historical visual tool results no longer crowd out later model context, and high-detail images are bounded by size and budget.

body.zh-CN: 聊天设置菜单、侧栏搜索和 Panel App 键盘输入在常见交互中更稳定。
body.en-US: Chat settings, sidebar search, and Panel App keyboard input now behave more consistently.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。
这是 NPM stable patch 版本，可通过正常的 NextClaw NPM 安装或更新流程使用。
body.en-US: This is an NPM stable patch release available through the normal NextClaw NPM install or update flow.
